title: CAPE accepted at MICCAI 2025
body: Lab members Elyar Esmaeilzadeh, Ehsan Garaaghaji and Farzad Hallaji Azad, with Dr. Doruk Öner, present CAPE — a Connectivity-Aware Path Enforcement loss for curvilinear structure delineation — at MICCAI 2025.

title: Detecting bronchiolitis obliterans from chest CT
body: Our collaborative work harnessing deep learning to detect bronchiolitis obliterans syndrome from chest CT appears in Communications Medicine.

title: PartSDF published in TMLR
body: PartSDF, a part-based implicit neural representation for composite 3D shape parametrization and optimization, is published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research.

title: Uncertainty estimation in iterative neural networks at ICML 2024
body: Our method for enabling efficient uncertainty estimation in iterative neural networks is presented at ICML 2024.

title: NeuraVision Research Lab established at Bilkent University
body: Dr. Doruk Öner founds the NeuraVision Research Lab in the Department of Computer Engineering at Bilkent University, focusing on topology-aware computer vision and trustworthy deep learning.
